title: Freecarts-Example Resourcepack
description: This is an example resource pack for my plugin "Freecarts"
body:
# Freecarts Example Resource packs
- An official page to Download Example resourcepack offered for the [Freecarts](https://modrinth.com/plugin/freecarts) plugin.
- This includes packs for Java only. Modrinth does not support GeyserMC resourcepacks.
- Bedrock(GeyserMC) packs can be downloaded from [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/iog6jb8penju4na396tdm/APHXAdCh4p4Q2kmFIZ4qUjM?rlkey=si7mzf9oftfkui089zhgfu13v&st=xfu8yhtj&dl=0).

![A showcase image for Hatchback Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afbec663c7486d8ff0a58de0e75d70aaedb42ad5_0.webp)

- These are Some basic example cart models I made. You can use this pack as base for adding your own custom cart models.
- [Download Freecarts](https://modrinth.com/plugin/freecarts)
- Report any bugs/issues in my Discord Channel : [Mavenverse](https://discord.gg/RkvtGfGEfe)
